snap(-10,-40,-70)

sky(170,130,130)
fog(125,100,100)
ground(125,100,100)
polys(128,128,128)
texture(255,255,255,0)
clouds(150,110,110,0,-20000)
mountains(8536)
fadefrom(1000000)
density(8421503)
name(The Test of Endurance)
soundtrack(rar2,endurance.mp3)

nlaps(1)

set(world/fullmoon,0,-2000000000,0,200000000)

maxt(0,260000,0)
maxb(0,-210000,0)
maxr(0,210000,0)
maxl(0,-210000,0)

set(40,0,100000,0)p
chk(40,0,100000,0)
set(40,0,100000,0)pt


set(23,0,150000,0)p
set(23,0,150000,180)p
set(32,0,150000,0)p

set(40,0,200000,0)p
chk(40,0,200000,0)
set(40,0,200000,0)pt

set(24,-50000,200000,90)p
set(24,-50000,200000,-90)p
set(33,-50000,200000,90)p

set(40,-100000,200000,0)p
chk(40,-100000,200000,0)
set(40,-100000,200000,0)pt

set(24,-100000,150000,0)p
set(24,-100000,150000,180)p
set(53,-100000,150000,180)p

set(40,-100000,100000,0)p
chk(40,-100000,100000,0)
set(40,-100000,100000,0)pt

set(40,0,100000,90)p
chk(40,0,100000,90)
set(40,0,100000,90)pt

set(24,50000,100000,90)p
set(24,50000,100000,-90)p
set(35,50000,100000,90)p

set(40,100000,100000,0)p
chk(40,100000,100000,0)
set(40,100000,100000,0)pt

set(24,104000,0,0)p
set(24,104000,0,180)p
set(62,104000,0,180)p
set(24,96000,0,0)
set(24,96000,0,180)
set(63,96000,0,180)

set(40,100000,-100000,0)p
chk(40,100000,-100000,0)
set(40,100000,-100000,0)pt

set(40,0,100000,0)p
chk(40,0,100000,0)
set(40,0,100000,0)pt

set(23,-100000,-50000,150)p
set(23,-100000,-50000,-30)p
set(27,-100000,-50000,150)p

set(40,-200000,-200000,0)p
chk(40,-200000,-200000,0)
set(40,-200000,-200000,0)pt

set(23,-200000,-100000,0)p
set(23,-200000,-100000,180)p
set(31,-200000,-100000,0)p

set(24,-200000,0,0)p
set(24,-200000,0,180)p
set(34,-200000,0,0)p

set(23,-200000,100000,0)p
set(23,-200000,100000,180)p
set(52,-200000,100000,0)p

set(40,-200000,250000,0)p
chk(40,-200000,250000,0)
set(40,-200000,250000,0)pt

set(23,-1000,250000,-90)p
set(26,-1000,250000,-90)p
set(26,1000,250000,90)
set(23,1000,250000,90)p

set(40,200000,250000,0)p
chk(40,200000,250000,0)
set(40,200000,250000,0)pt

set(23,200000,100000,0)p
set(23,200000,100000,180)p
set(31,200000,100000,180)p

set(24,200000,0,0)p
set(24,200000,0,180)p
set(34,200000,0,180)p

set(50,200000,-100000,180)p
set(50,200000,-100000,180)p
set(50,200000,-100000,180)p

set(40,200000,-200000,0)p
chk(40,200000,-200000,0)
set(40,200000,-200000,0)pt

set(40,0,-200000,0)p
chk(40,0,-200000,0)
set(40,0,-200000,0)pt

set(40,0,100000,0)p
chk(40,0,100000,0)
set(40,0,100000,0)pt
